meta.title: Free ADHD Tools That Help You Start | Doubly
meta.description: Free, no-signup tools designed for ADHD brains. Pomodoro timers, brain dumps, and more - built for the moment you need to start, not just plan.
meta.ogTitle: Free ADHD Tools That Help You Start
meta.ogDescription: No signup. No popups. Free tools built for ADHD brains, from the team behind the Doubly app.
meta.twitterTitle: Free ADHD Tools That Help You Start
meta.twitterDescription: No signup. No popups. Free tools built for ADHD brains.

h1: Free ADHD tools that help you start
intro: Free, no-signup tools designed for ADHD brains. Built for the moment you’re overwhelmed, not for the moment you’re ready to plan. Use them in your browser. Save your progress. Walk away whenever.

cards.title: Task Breakdown Tool
cards.description: Type a task you cannot start. AI splits it into small, doable steps with time estimates. Built for ADHD brains.

cards.title: Brain Dump Tool
cards.description: Dump everything in your head, AI pulls out only the actionable tasks. No signup, nothing stored.

cards.title: Pick One Task Tool
cards.description: Paste a messy to-do list, get one thing to start with. Smallest, scariest, or random. Built for the moment ten tasks reads as one giant unstartable thing.

cards.title: Eisenhower Matrix (ADHD Edition)
cards.description: Drag tasks into quadrants like "boring but important" instead of textbook labels. The matrix that finally fits an ADHD brain. Saves locally.

cards.title: ADHD Pomodoro Timer
cards.description: 25-minute work, 5-minute break - the focus method that finally fits an ADHD brain. Free, no signup, works offline.

cards.title: Visual Timer / Time Blindness Clock
cards.description: A shrinking pie wedge so you can see time passing instead of reading digits. Doubles as a time blindness clock for ADHD adults.

cards.title: Ambient Sound Generator
cards.description: Free in-browser ambient sound generator. Brown noise plus pink and white. Steady background sound to quiet a busy ADHD brain. Sleep timer included, works offline.

cards.title: Body Doubling Room
cards.description: Free two-person focus room. Share a link, work side by side over peer-to-peer video, run a shared timer. No signup, no install.

cards.title: Hyperfocus Interrupt Timer
cards.description: Recurring spoken check-ins every X minutes and an optional hard stop, so an ADHD hyperfocus session does not eat your whole afternoon.

cta.headline: Try it in the app
cta.body: The web tools help you start one task. The Doubly iOS app helps you keep going - brain dump, one clear next step, and accountability check-ins from real people.
cta.label: Try it in the app
